amplify.app.AccessToken.Docs: Personal Access token for 3rd party source control system for an Amplify app, used to create webhook and read-only deploy key. Token is not stored.

amplify.app.AutoBranchCreationConfig.Docs: Sets the configuration for your automatic branch creation.

amplify.app.BasicAuthConfig.Docs: The credentials for basic authorization for an Amplify app. You must base64-encode the authorization credentials and provide them in the format `user:password`.

amplify.app.BuildSpec.Docs: The build specification (build spec) for an Amplify app.

amplify.app.CustomHeaders.Docs: The custom HTTP headers for an Amplify app.

amplify.app.CustomRules.Docs: The custom rewrite and redirect rules for an Amplify app.

amplify.app.Description.Docs: The description for an Amplify app.

amplify.app.EnableBranchAutoDeletion.Docs: Automatically disconnect a branch in the Amplify Console when you delete a branch from your Git repository.

amplify.app.EnvironmentVariables.Docs: The environment variables map for an Amplify app.

amplify.app.IAMServiceRole.Docs: The AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) service role for the Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amplify app.

amplify.app.Name.Docs: The name for an Amplify app.

amplify.app.OauthToken.Docs: The OAuth token for a third-party source control system for an Amplify app. The OAuth token is used to create a webhook and a read-only deploy key. The OAuth token is not stored.

amplify.app.Repository.Docs: The repository for an Amplify app.

amplify.app.Tags.Docs: The tag for an Amplify app.
